name: Linux Platform Capability Live Proof
description: Server-backed live-response proof for Roadmap K on lab-linux01. Executes bounded, non-sensitive Linux commands to prove endpoint reachability and live evidence shape for FIM baseline/change, inventory freshness, and compliance evidence without claiming full FIM collector or SIEM delivery maturity.
claim_boundary: Live endpoint command/audit proof only. Does not prove production FIM collector baseline/change events, compliance posture, vulnerability enrichment, or external SIEM delivery ack.

tests.name: Linux live FIM baseline/change evidence shape
tests.fallback_command:
p=/tmp/tamandua-fim-live-proof-$$.txt; printf 'tamandua-fim-baseline
' > $p; b=$(sha256sum $p | awk '{print $1}'); printf 'tamandua-fim-change
' >> $p; c=$(sha256sum $p | awk '{print $1}'); printf 'tamandua_platform_fim_live path=%s baseline_sha256=%s changed_sha256=%s changed=%s
' "$p" "$b" "$c" "$(test "$b" != "$c" && echo true || echo false)"; rm -f $p

tests.name: Linux live inventory freshness evidence shape
tests.fallback_command: printf 'tamandua_platform_inventory_live hostname=%s kernel=%s uptime_seconds=%s os=%s\n' "$(hostname)" "$(uname -r)" "$(cut -d. -f1 /proc/uptime)" "$(. /etc/os-release 2>/dev/null; echo ${ID:-unknown}-${VERSION_ID:-unknown})"

tests.name: Linux live compliance control evidence shape
tests.fallback_command: mode=$(stat -c '%a' /etc/passwd 2>/dev/null || echo unknown); owner=$(stat -c '%U:%G' /etc/passwd 2>/dev/null || echo unknown); hash=$(sha256sum /etc/passwd 2>/dev/null | awk '{print $1}'); printf 'tamandua_platform_compliance_live control=linux-passwd-permissions path=/etc/passwd mode=%s owner=%s evidence_sha256=%s\n' "$mode" "$owner" "$hash"
